tEn: Llemma: An Open Language Model For Mathematics
tZh: Llemma：一个开放的数学语言模型
sEn: Llemma, an open language model for mathematics, outperforms all known open base models on MATH and supports tool use and theorem proving without finetuning.
sZh: Llemma是一个开放的数学语言模型，在MATH基准测试中优于所有已知的开放基础模型，并且无需微调即可支持工具使用和定理证明。
absEn: We present Llemma, a large language model for mathematics. We continue pretraining Code Llama on the Proof-Pile-2, a mixture of scientific papers, web data containing mathematics, and mathematical code, yielding Llemma. On the MATH benchmark Llemma outperforms all known open base models, as well as the unreleased Minerva model suite on an equi-parameter basis. Moreover, Llemma is capable of tool use and formal theorem proving without any further finetuning. We openly release all artifacts, including 7 billion and 34 billion parameter models, the Proof-Pile-2, and code to replicate our experiments.
absZh: 我们提出了Llemma，一个用于数学的大型语言模型。我们在Proof-Pile-2（一个包含科学论文、数学相关网络数据和数学代码的混合数据集）上继续预训练Code Llama，从而得到了Llemma。在MATH基准测试中，Llemma在同等参数规模下优于所有已知的开放基础模型，以及未发布的Minerva模型系列。此外，Llemma无需任何进一步微调即可进行工具使用和形式定理证明。我们公开发布了所有成果，包括70亿和340亿参数的模型、Proof-Pile-2数据集以及用于复现实验的代码。

contrib.en: Trained and released Llemma 7B and 34B models, new state-of-the-art open base models on MATH.
contrib.zh: 训练并发布了Llemma 7B和34B模型，在MATH上达到开源基础模型新最优。

contrib.en: Released Proof-Pile-2, a 55B-token dataset of scientific papers, math web data, and code.
contrib.zh: 发布了Proof-Pile-2，一个550亿词元的科学论文、数学网页数据和代码数据集。

contrib.en: Demonstrated few-shot tool use (Python) and formal theorem proving without finetuning.
contrib.zh: 展示了无需微调的少样本工具使用（Python）和形式定理证明。

contrib.en: Open-sourced all artifacts: models, dataset, and code for reproducibility.
contrib.zh: 开源了所有工件：模型、数据集和可复现代码。

contrib.en: Provided analysis of data mixture, memorization, and supervised finetuning.
contrib.zh: 提供了数据混合、记忆化和监督微调的分析。

limits.en: Llemma's performance on MATH may be partially influenced by memorization of training data.
limits.zh: Llemma在MATH上的表现可能部分受训练数据记忆化的影响。

limits.en: The 34B model training was limited to 50B tokens due to compute constraints.
limits.zh: 34B模型训练因算力限制仅进行了500亿词元。

limits.en: Formal theorem proving evaluation is limited to few-shot settings without finetuning.
limits.zh: 形式定理证明评估仅限于无微调的少样本设置。

limits.en: The study does not explore scaling laws or optimal data composition for math domain.
limits.zh: 该研究未探索数学领域的缩放定律或最优数据组成。

items.en: We present Llemma, a large language model for mathematics. We continue pretraining Code Llama on 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2}, a mixture of scientific papers, web data containing mathematics, and mathematical code, yielding Llemma. On the MATH benchmark Llemma outperforms all known open base models, as well as the unreleased Minerva model suite on an equi-parameter basis. Moreover, Llemma is capable of tool use and formal theorem proving without any further finetuning. We openly release all artifacts, including 7 billion and 34 billion parameter models, the 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2}, and code to replicate our experiments.111https://github.com/EleutherAI/math-lm
items.zh: 我们提出了Llemma，一个用于数学的大型语言模型。我们在Proof-Pile-2上继续预训练Code Llama，Proof-Pile-2是科学论文、包含数学的网络数据和数学代码的混合体，从而得到了Llemma。在MATH基准测试中，Llemma在同等参数基础上优于所有已知的开放基础模型以及未发布的Minerva模型套件。此外，Llemma无需任何进一步微调即可使用工具和进行形式定理证明。我们公开发布所有成果，包括70亿和340亿参数的模型、Proof-Pile-2以及复现我们实验的代码。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Continued pretraining on 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2} yields Llemma, a base model with improved mathematical capabilities.
items.capZh: 图1：在Proof-Pile-2上继续预训练得到Llemma，一个数学能力得到提升的基础模型。

items.en: Language models trained on diverse mixtures of text display remarkably general language understanding and generation capabilities (Brown et al., 2020; Chowdhery et al., 2022), serving as base models that are adapted to a wide range of applications (Raffel et al., 2023). Applications such as open-ended dialogue (Thoppilan et al., 2022; Touvron et al., 2023) or instruction following (Ouyang et al., 2022; Wei et al., 2022) require balanced performance across the entire distribution of natural text, thus favoring generalist models. However, if we seek to maximize performance within one domain, such as medicine (Singhal et al., 2022; 2023), finance (Wu et al., 2023), or science (Taylor et al., 2022), a domain-specific language model may offer superior capabilities for a given computational cost, or lower computational cost for a given level of capability.
items.zh: 在多样化文本混合上训练的语言模型展现出显著通用的语言理解和生成能力（Brown等人，2020；Chowdhery等人，2022），作为基础模型可适应广泛的应用（Raffel等人，2023）。诸如开放式对话（Thoppilan等人，2022；Touvron等人，2023）或指令遵循（Ouyang等人，2022；Wei等人，2022）等应用需要在自然文本的整个分布上保持平衡的性能，因此倾向于通用模型。然而，如果我们希望在某个领域内最大化性能，例如医学（Singhal等人，2022；2023）、金融（Wu等人，2023）或科学（Taylor等人，2022），领域特定的语言模型可能在给定的计算成本下提供更优的能力，或在给定的能力水平下降低计算成本。

items.en: In this work, we train a domain-specific language model for mathematics. We have several motivations for doing so. First, solving mathematical problems requires pattern matching against a large body of specialized prior knowledge, thus serving as an ideal setting for domain adaptation. Second, mathematical reasoning is in itself a central AI task, its study dating back to at least Gelernter (1959) and Wang (1960) and continuing to today (Lu et al., 2023). Third, language models capable of strong mathematical reasoning are upstream of a number of research topics, such as reward modeling (Uesato et al., 2022; Lightman et al., 2023), reinforcement learning for reasoning (Polu et al., 2022; Lample et al., 2022), and algorithmic reasoning (Zhou et al., 2022; Zhang et al., 2023).
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们训练了一个面向数学的领域特定语言模型。我们这样做有几个动机。首先，解决数学问题需要针对大量专业先验知识进行模式匹配，因此是领域适应的理想场景。其次，数学推理本身是一个核心的人工智能任务，其研究至少可以追溯到Gelernter（1959）和Wang（1960），并持续至今（Lu等人，2023）。第三，具有强大数学推理能力的语言模型是许多研究主题的上游，例如奖励建模（Uesato等人，2022；Lightman等人，2023）、用于推理的强化学习（Polu等人，2022；Lample等人，2022）和算法推理（Zhou等人，2022；Zhang等人，2023）。

items.en: Although domain-specific models for mathematics have been trained in the past, they have either been closed access (Lewkowycz et al., 2022), limiting their ability to become a platform for further research, or have lagged far behind the closed access state-of-the-art (Azerbayev et al., 2023).
items.zh: 尽管过去已经训练过面向数学的领域特定模型，但它们要么是封闭访问的（Lewkowycz等人，2022），限制了其成为进一步研究平台的能力，要么远远落后于封闭访问的最先进水平（Azerbayev等人，2023）。

items.en: We present a recipe for adapting a language model to mathematics through continued pretraining (Lewkowycz et al., 2022; Rozière et al., 2023) on 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2}, a diverse mixture of math-related text and code. Applying the recipe to Code Llama (Rozière et al., 2023) yields Llemma: 7 billion and 34 billion parameter base language models with substantially improved mathematical capabilities.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种通过在Proof-Pile-2（数学相关文本和代码的多样化混合）上继续预训练（Lewkowycz等人，2022；Rozière等人，2023）来使语言模型适应数学的方法。将该方法应用于Code Llama（Rozière等人，2023）得到了Llemma：70亿和340亿参数的基础语言模型，数学能力显著提升。

items.en: Specifically, our contributions are as follows:
items.zh: 具体来说，我们的贡献如下：

items.en: We train and release the Llemma models: 7B and 34B parameter language models specialized for mathematics. The Llemma models are a new state-of-the-art for publicly released base models on MATH (Lewkowycz et al., 2022).
items.zh: 我们训练并发布了Llemma模型：专门用于数学的70亿和340亿参数语言模型。Llemma模型是MATH（Lewkowycz等人，2022）上公开发布的基础模型的新最先进水平。

items.en: We release the 𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄\mathsf{AlgebraicStack}, a dataset of 11B tokens of code specifically related to mathematics.
items.zh: 我们发布了AlgebraicStack，一个110亿token的数学相关代码数据集。

items.en: We demonstrate that Llemma is capable of using computational tools to solve mathematical problems, namely, the Python interpreter and formal theorem provers.
items.zh: 我们证明了Llemma能够使用计算工具解决数学问题，即Python解释器和形式定理证明器。

items.en: Unlike prior mathematics language models such as Minerva (Lewkowycz et al., 2022), the Llemma models are open access and we open source our training data and code. This allows Llemma to serve as a platform for future research in mathematical reasoning.
items.zh: 与先前的数学语言模型（如Minerva（Lewkowycz等人，2022））不同，Llemma模型是开放访问的，并且我们开源了训练数据和代码。这使得Llemma能够成为未来数学推理研究的平台。

items.en: Our work builds on findings in Minerva (Lewkowycz et al., 2022), but differs in several ways: (1) Llemma’s training and evaluation covers a wider range of data and tasks, notably code data (e.g., the 𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄\mathsf{AlgebraicStack}), tool use, and formal mathematics; (2) our work only depends on publicly accessible tools and data; (3) we provide new analyses related to the continued training data mixture, memorization, and additional supervised finetuning; (4) we make all artifacts publicly available.
items.zh: 我们的工作建立在Minerva（Lewkowycz等人，2022）的发现之上，但在几个方面有所不同：（1）Llemma的训练和评估涵盖了更广泛的数据和任务，特别是代码数据（例如AlgebraicStack）、工具使用和形式数学；（2）我们的工作仅依赖于公开可用的工具和数据；（3）我们提供了与继续训练数据混合、记忆化和额外监督微调相关的新分析；（4）我们公开了所有成果。

items.en: Llemma models are 7 billion and 34 billion parameter language models specialized for mathematics. Our approach is to continue pretraining Code Llama (Rozière et al., 2023) on the 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2}.
items.zh: Llemma模型是专门用于数学的70亿和340亿参数语言模型。我们的方法是在Proof-Pile-2上继续预训练Code Llama（Rozière等人，2023）。

items.en: We form the 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2}, a 55B-token mixture of scientific papers, web data containing mathematics, and mathematical code. With the exception of the Lean proofsteps subset (see Appendix B), the 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2} has a knowledge cutoff of April 2023.
items.zh: 我们构建了Proof-Pile-2，一个550亿token的混合数据集，包含科学论文、包含数学的网络数据和数学代码。除了Lean证明步骤子集（见附录B）外，Proof-Pile-2的知识截止日期为2023年4月。

items.en: Computational tools such as numerical simulations, computer algebra systems, and formal theorem provers are of ever increasing importance to mathematicians (Avigad, 2018). Motivated by this fact, we create 𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄\mathsf{AlgebraicStack}, an 11B-token dataset of source code from 17 languages, spanning numerical, symbolic, and formal math. The dataset consists of filtered code from the Stack (Kocetkov et al., 2022), public GitHub repositories, and formal proofstep data. Table 9 shows the number of tokens by language in 𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄\mathsf{AlgebraicStack}. See Appendix B.1 for further details on 𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄\mathsf{AlgebraicStack}.
items.zh: 计算工具，如数值模拟、计算机代数系统和形式定理证明器，对数学家来说越来越重要（Avigad，2018）。受此启发，我们创建了AlgebraicStack，一个110亿token的数据集，包含来自17种编程语言的源代码，涵盖数值、符号和形式数学。该数据集由来自Stack（Kocetkov等人，2022）的过滤代码、公共GitHub仓库和形式证明步骤数据组成。表9显示了AlgebraicStack中按语言划分的token数量。有关AlgebraicStack的更多详细信息，请参见附录B.1。

items.en: We use OpenWebMath (Paster et al., 2023), a 15B-token dataset of high-quality web pages filtered for mathematical content. OpenWebMath filters CommonCrawl web pages based on math-related keywords and a classifier-based math score, preserves mathematical formatting (e.g., LaTeX, AsciiMath), and includes additional quality filters (e.g., perplexity, domain, length) and near-deduplication. Refer to Paster et al. (2023) for a full description of OpenWebMath.
items.zh: 我们使用OpenWebMath（Paster等人，2023），一个150亿token的高质量网页数据集，这些网页经过数学内容过滤。OpenWebMath基于数学相关关键词和基于分类器的数学分数过滤CommonCrawl网页，保留数学格式（例如LaTeX、AsciiMath），并包含额外的质量过滤器（例如困惑度、域名、长度）和近似去重。有关OpenWebMath的完整描述，请参考Paster等人（2023）。

items.en: We use the ArXiv subset of RedPajama (Computer, 2023), an open-access reproduction of the LLaMA training dataset. The ArXiv subset contains 29B tokens.
items.zh: 我们使用RedPajama（Computer，2023）的ArXiv子集，这是LLaMA训练数据集的开放访问复现。ArXiv子集包含290亿token。

items.en: Following Lewkowycz et al. (2022), our training mixture consists of a small amount of general domain data, which functions as a form of regularization. Since the pretraining dataset for LLaMA 2 is undisclosed, we use the Pile (Gao et al., 2020; Biderman et al., 2022) as a surrogate training dataset. We set 95% of our training mixture to be the 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2}, 2% to be from the Pile (with ArXiv removed, as it is separately in 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2}), and 3% to be the GitHub subset of RedPajama (Computer, 2023).
items.zh: 遵循Lewkowycz等人（2022），我们的训练混合包含少量通用领域数据，作为正则化的一种形式。由于LLaMA 2的预训练数据集未公开，我们使用Pile（Gao等人，2020；Biderman等人，2022）作为替代训练数据集。我们将训练混合的95%设置为Proof-Pile-2，2%来自Pile（移除ArXiv，因为它已单独包含在Proof-Pile-2中），3%来自RedPajama（Computer，2023）的GitHub子集。

items.en: Further information on dataset composition and a datasheet are in Appendix B and Appendix E, respectively. We publicly release 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2} at hf.co/datasets/EleutherAI/proof-pile-2.
items.zh: 有关数据集组成的更多信息和数据表分别见附录B和附录E。我们在hf.co/datasets/EleutherAI/proof-pile-2公开发布Proof-Pile-2。

items.en: Each model is initialized from Code Llama (Rozière et al., 2023). Code Llama models are decoder-only transformer language models initialized from Llama 2 (Touvron et al., 2023) and further trained on 500B tokens of code. We continue training the Code Llama models on 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2} using a standard autoregressive language modeling objective. We train the 7B model for 200B tokens, and the 34B model for 50B tokens.
items.zh: 每个模型从Code Llama（Rozière等人，2023）初始化。Code Llama模型是仅解码器的Transformer语言模型，从Llama 2（Touvron等人，2023）初始化，并在5000亿token的代码上进一步训练。我们使用标准的自回归语言建模目标在Proof-Pile-2上继续训练Code Llama模型。我们对70亿模型训练2000亿token，对340亿模型训练500亿token。

items.en: We train all models in 𝖻𝖿𝗅𝗈𝖺𝗍𝟣𝟨𝖻𝖿𝗅𝗈𝖺𝗍𝟣𝟨\mathsf{bfloat16} mixed precision using the GPT-NeoX library (Andonian et al., 2023) across 256 A100 40GB GPUs. We use Tensor Parallelism (Shoeybi et al., 2019) with a world size of 2 for Llemma-7B , and a world size of 8 for Llemma-34B, alongside ZeRO Stage 1 sharded optimizer states (Rajbhandari et al., 2020) across Data Parallel (Goyal et al., 2017) replicas. We use Flash Attention 2 (Dao, 2023) to improve throughput and further reduce memory requirements.
items.zh: 我们使用GPT-NeoX库（Andonian等人，2023）在256块A100 40GB GPU上以bfloat16混合精度训练所有模型。对于Llemma-7B，我们使用张量并行（Shoeybi等人，2019），世界大小为2；对于Llemma-34B，世界大小为8，同时跨数据并行（Goyal等人，2017）副本使用ZeRO Stage 1分片优化器状态（Rajbhandari等人，2020）。我们使用Flash Attention 2（Dao，2023）来提高吞吐量并进一步减少内存需求。

items.en: Llemma 7B is trained for 42,0004200042,000 steps with a global batch size of 4 million tokens and a 4096 token context length. This corresponds to roughly 23,0002300023,000 A100-hours. The learning rate is warmed up to 1⋅10−4⋅1superscript1041\cdot 10^{-4} over 500500500 steps, then set to cosine decay to 1/301301/30th of the maximum learning rate over 48,0004800048,000 steps. The reason for the discrepancy between the number of training steps and the scheduler length is that we planned to train for 48,0004800048,000 steps, but encountered NaN losses after step 42,0004200042,000, likely caused by unstable optimization or hardware failures (Elsen et al., 2023).
items.zh: Llemma 7B训练了42,000步，全局批次大小为400万个token，上下文长度为4096个token。这大约对应23,000 A100小时。学习率在500步内预热至1·10^{-4}，然后在48,000步内按余弦衰减至最大学习率的1/30。训练步数与调度器长度不一致的原因是，我们原计划训练48,000步，但在42,000步后遇到了NaN损失，可能是由不稳定的优化或硬件故障引起的（Elsen等人，2023）。

items.en: Llemma 34B is trained for 12,0001200012,000 steps with a global batch size of 4 million tokens and a 4096 context length. This corresponds to roughly 47,0004700047,000 A100-hours. The learning rate is warmed up to 5⋅10−5⋅5superscript1055\cdot 10^{-5} over 500500500 steps, then decayed to 1/301301/30th the peak learning rate.
items.zh: Llemma 34B训练了12,000步，全局批次大小为400万个token，上下文长度为4096。这大约对应47,000 A100小时。学习率在500步内预热至5·10^{-5}，然后衰减至峰值学习率的1/30。

items.en: Before training Llemma 7B, we contract the RoPE (Su et al., 2022) base period of the Code Llama 7B initialization from θ=1,000,000𝜃1000000\theta=1,000,000 to θ=10,000𝜃10000\theta=10,000. This is so that the long context finetuning procedure described in Peng et al. (2023)and Rozière et al. (2023) can be repeated on the trained Llemma 7B (we leave actually doing so to future work). Due to compute constraints, we were unable to verify that training Llemma 34B with a contracted RoPE base period did not come with a performance penalty, therefore for that model we preserved θ=1,000,000𝜃1000000\theta=1,000,000.
items.zh: 在训练Llemma 7B之前，我们将Code Llama 7B初始化的RoPE（Su等人，2022）基周期从θ=1,000,000压缩到θ=10,000。这样，Peng等人（2023）和Rozière等人（2023）描述的长上下文微调过程可以重复应用于训练后的Llemma 7B（我们将其留给未来工作）。由于算力限制，我们无法验证使用压缩RoPE基周期训练Llemma 34B是否会导致性能损失，因此对于该模型，我们保留了θ=1,000,000。

items.en: Our goal is to evaluate Llemma as a base model for mathematical text. To this end, we compare Llemma models using few-shot evaluation (Brown et al., 2020), and primarily focus on state-of-the-art models that have not been finetuned on supervised examples for the task. First, we evaluate the model’s ability to solve mathematics problems using chain of thought reasoning (Wei et al., 2023) and majority voting (Wang et al., 2023). Our evaluations include MATH (Hendrycks et al., 2021b) and GSM8k (Cobbe et al., 2021), the de-facto standard benchmarks for evaluating quantitative reasoning in language models (Lewkowycz et al., 2022). Second, we explore few-shot tool use and formal theorem proving. Third, we study the effects of memorization and the data mixture. Appendix G contains a preliminary study of supervised finetuning with Llemma.
items.zh: 我们的目标是评估Llemma作为数学文本的基础模型。为此，我们使用少样本评估（Brown等人，2020）比较Llemma模型，并主要关注未针对任务进行监督微调的最先进模型。首先，我们评估模型使用思维链推理（Wei等人，2023）和多数投票（Wang等人，2023）解决数学问题的能力。我们的评估包括MATH（Hendrycks等人，2021b）和GSM8k（Cobbe等人，2021），这是评估语言模型定量推理的事实标准基准（Lewkowycz等人，2022）。其次，我们探索少样本工具使用和形式定理证明。第三，我们研究记忆化和数据混合的影响。附录G包含Llemma的监督微调初步研究。

items.en: These tasks involve generating self-contained text solutions to problems expressed in LaTeX or natural language, without using external tools (Lewkowycz et al., 2022). We use the following evaluation:
items.zh: 这些任务涉及生成用LaTeX或自然语言表达的问题的自包含文本解决方案，而不使用外部工具（Lewkowycz等人，2022）。我们使用以下评估：

items.en: MATH (Hendrycks et al., 2021b), a dataset with 12.5k problems (5k evaluation) from high-school math competitions. Given a problem statement, the model generates a LaTeXsolution and an answer that must match a reference answer. We follow a similar task implementation to Lewkowycz et al. (2022), using their four-example prompt and evaluating answers for exact string match or SymPy equivalence.
items.zh: MATH（Hendrycks等人，2021b），一个包含12.5k个问题（5k评估）的数据集，来自高中数学竞赛。给定问题陈述，模型生成LaTeX解决方案和答案，答案必须与参考答案匹配。我们遵循与Lewkowycz等人（2022）类似的任务实现，使用他们的四示例提示，并通过精确字符串匹配或SymPy等价性评估答案。

items.en: GSM8k (Cobbe et al., 2021), a dataset of middle-school level math word problems. We use the 8-shot prompt from Wei et al. (2023), as Lewkowycz et al. (2022) do not specify their evaluation prompt or number of few-shot examples.
items.zh: GSM8k（Cobbe等人，2021），一个中学数学应用题数据集。我们使用Wei等人（2023）的8-shot提示，因为Lewkowycz等人（2022）未指定其评估提示或少样本示例数量。

items.en: OCWCourses (Lewkowycz et al., 2022), a collection of undergraduate-level STEM problems harvested from MIT’s OpenCourseWare. We use the four-example prompt provided by (Lewkowycz et al., 2022).
items.zh: OCWCourses（Lewkowycz等人，2022），从MIT开放课程中收集的本科STEM问题集合。我们使用Lewkowycz等人（2022）提供的四示例提示。

items.en: MMLU-STEM (Hendrycks et al., 2021a), a subset of 18 out of 57 subjects in the MMLU benchmark. We follow Lewkowycz et al. (2022) and use their provided four-example chain-of-thought prompt.
items.zh: MMLU-STEM（Hendrycks等人，2021a），MMLU基准中57个科目中的18个科目的子集。我们遵循Lewkowycz等人（2022），使用他们提供的四示例思维链提示。

items.en: SAT, we create a dataset consisting of the 32 math questions that do not contain figures from the May 2023 College Board SAT examination, which is after our model’s knowledge cutoff.
items.zh: SAT，我们创建了一个数据集，包含2023年5月大学理事会SAT考试中不包含图形的32道数学题，该考试在我们的模型知识截止日期之后。

items.en: We compare with Minerva (Lewkowycz et al., 2022), which continued pretraining the PaLM language model on a dataset of technical content; Code Llama, the initialization of Llemma’s continued pretraining; and Llama 2, the initialization of Code Llama’s continued pretraining on code. For open access models, we report scores computed using our evaluation suite, which is implemented as a fork of the Language Model Evaluation Harness (Gao et al., 2021). For Minerva models, we report benchmark scores from Lewkowycz et al. (2022).
items.zh: 我们与Minerva（Lewkowycz等人，2022）进行比较，后者在技术内容数据集上继续预训练了PaLM语言模型；与Code Llama（Llemma继续预训练的初始化）比较；以及与Llama 2（Code Llama在代码上继续预训练的初始化）比较。对于开放访问模型，我们报告使用我们的评估套件计算的分数，该套件是Language Model Evaluation Harness（Gao等人，2021）的一个分支。对于Minerva模型，我们报告Lewkowycz等人（2022）的基准分数。

items.en: Llemma’s continued pretraining on 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2} improves few-shot performance on the five mathematical benchmarks. Llemma 34B improves over Code Llama by 20 percentage points on GSM8k and 13 points on MATH, and Llemma 7B outperforms the proprietary Minerva model. Our approach also outperforms all open-weight language models at the time of writing. We conclude that continued pretraining on 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2} is effective for improving a pretrained model’s ability to perform mathematical problem solving.
items.zh: Llemma在Proof-Pile-2上的继续预训练提高了五个数学基准上的少样本性能。Llemma 34B在GSM8k上比Code Llama提高了20个百分点，在MATH上提高了13个百分点，而Llemma 7B优于专有的Minerva模型。我们的方法也优于目前所有开放权重的语言模型。我们得出结论，在Proof-Pile-2上继续预训练对于提高预训练模型解决数学问题的能力是有效的。

items.en: Llemma is pretrained on a diverse distribution of mathematics-related data, and is not tuned for a particular task. Therefore, we expect that Llemma can adapt to many other tasks via task-specific finetuning and few-shot prompting.
items.zh: Llemma在多样化的数学相关数据分布上进行预训练，并未针对特定任务进行调整。因此，我们期望Llemma能够通过任务特定的微调和少样本提示适应许多其他任务。

full.sec: 3.2 Mathematical problem solving with tool use
full.secZh: 3.2 使用工具的数学问题求解

items.en: These tasks involve solving problems with access to computational tools. We evaluate the following:
items.zh: 这些任务涉及使用计算工具解决问题。我们评估以下内容：

items.en: MATH+Python, the model is prompted to alternately describe a solution step in natural language, then execute that step with code. The final answer is a program that executes to a numeric type or a SymPy object. Our few-shot prompt includes examples that use built-in numeric operations, the math module, and SymPy.
items.zh: MATH+Python，模型被提示交替用自然语言描述一个解决步骤，然后用代码执行该步骤。最终答案是一个执行结果为数值类型或SymPy对象的程序。我们的少样本提示包括使用内置数值运算、math模块和SymPy的示例。

items.en: GSM8k+Python, solving a GSM8k word problem by writing a Python program that executes to an integer answer. We use the prompt from Gao et al. (2023).
items.zh: GSM8k+Python，通过编写一个执行结果为整数答案的Python程序来解决GSM8k应用题。我们使用Gao等人（2023）的提示。

items.en: As seen in Table 3, Llemma improves over Code Llama on both tasks. Its performance on MATH and GSM8k with tools is also higher than its performance on these datasets without tools.
items.zh: 如表3所示，Llemma在这两项任务上都优于Code Llama。它在使用工具的MATH和GSM8k上的性能也高于不使用工具时的性能。

items.en: Interactive proof assistants such as Lean (de Moura et al., 2015), Isabelle (Wenzel et al., 2008), and Coq (Paulin-Mohring, 1989a; b) express mathematics in programming languages that allow for verification. These languages are data scarce compared to mainstream languages, especially in the context of pretraining. For instance, the Stack dataset used to pretrain language models in the BigCode project (Allal et al., 2023) has over 700 gigabytes of Python, compared to 322 megabytes of Lean. Proof assistants also require models to leverage information that is not present in raw source code, such as goal states that contain information about each step of a proof.
items.zh: 交互式证明助手，如Lean（de Moura等人，2015）、Isabelle（Wenzel等人，2008）和Coq（Paulin-Mohring，1989a;b），用允许验证的编程语言表达数学。这些语言与主流语言相比数据稀缺，尤其是在预训练背景下。例如，BigCode项目（Allal等人，2023）中用于预训练语言模型的Stack数据集有超过700GB的Python，而Lean只有322MB。证明助手还要求模型利用原始源代码中不存在的信息，例如包含证明每一步信息的目标状态。

items.en: 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2}’s 𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄\mathsf{AlgebraicStack} contains over 1.5 billion tokens of formal mathematics data, including proof states extracted from Lean and Isabelle formalizations. While a full investigation of formal math is outside the scope of this paper, we evaluate Llemma few-shot on two tasks:
items.zh: Proof-Pile-2的AlgebraicStack包含超过15亿token的形式数学数据，包括从Lean和Isabelle形式化中提取的证明状态。虽然对形式数学的全面研究超出了本文的范围，但我们在两个任务上对Llemma进行了少样本评估：

items.en: Informal-to-formal proving (Jiang et al., 2023), the task of generating a formal proof, given a formal statement, an informal LaTeX statement, and an informal LaTeX proof. The formal proof is checked by the proof assistant. We use the Isabelle proof assistant and evaluate on miniF2F (Zheng et al., 2021), a benchmark consisting of problem statements from Olympiads and undergraduate coursework. For the prompt, we use 11 (formal statement, informal statement, informal proof, formal proof) examples from Jiang et al. (2023), selecting 7 examples for number theory problems, and 6 examples for all others. We generate a single proof with greedy decoding.
items.zh: 非形式到形式证明（Jiang et al., 2023）的任务是：给定一个形式化陈述、一个非形式化的 LaTeX 陈述和一个非形式化的 LaTeX 证明，生成一个形式化证明。形式化证明由证明助手检查。我们使用 Isabelle 证明助手，并在 miniF2F（Zheng et al., 2021）上进行评估，该基准包含来自奥林匹克竞赛和本科课程的问题陈述。对于提示，我们使用了 Jiang et al. (2023) 中的 11 个（形式化陈述、非形式化陈述、非形式化证明、形式化证明）示例，其中数论问题选取 7 个示例，其他问题选取 6 个示例。我们使用贪心解码生成单个证明。

items.en: Formal-to-formal proving (e.g., Polu & Sutskever (2020)), the task of proving a formal statement by generating a sequence of proof steps (tactics). At each step, the input is a state xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t} given by the proof assistant, and the language model’s task is to generate a proof step ytsubscript𝑦𝑡y_{t} (a sequence of code). The proof step is checked by the proof assistant, yielding a new state xt+1subscript𝑥𝑡1x_{t+1} or an error message. The process continues, stopping if a proof is completed or a timeout is reached. We prompt the model using three (xt,yt)subscript𝑥𝑡subscript𝑦𝑡(x_{t},y_{t}) examples. We evaluate on miniF2F (Zheng et al., 2021) using the Lean 4 proof assistant, and use a standard best first search. See Appendix D for more details.
items.zh: 形式到形式证明（例如，Polu & Sutskever (2020)）的任务是通过生成一系列证明步骤（策略）来证明一个形式化陈述。每一步，输入是由证明助手给出的状态 x_t，语言模型的任务是生成一个证明步骤 y_t（一段代码）。证明步骤由证明助手检查，产生新状态 x_{t+1} 或错误消息。该过程持续进行，直到证明完成或达到超时。我们使用三个 (x_t, y_t) 示例来提示模型。我们在 miniF2F（Zheng et al., 2021）上使用 Lean 4 证明助手进行评估，并使用标准的最佳优先搜索。更多细节见附录 D。

items.en: As seen in Table 4, Llemma’s continued pretraining on 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2} improved few-shot performance on the two formal theorem proving tasks.
items.zh: 如表 4 所示，Llemma 在 Proof-Pile-2 上的持续预训练提高了两个形式定理证明任务上的少样本性能。

items.en: On informal-to-formal proving, Llemma-7b closes 22.1% of the theorems, improving upon its Code Llama initialization and the Sledgehammer prover. The theorems that Llemma proves are often complementary to those proved with Sledgehammer: taking the union of Sledgehammer and Llemma proofs results in 26 new validation proofs (an 11 percentage-point increase), and 17 new test proofs (a 7 point increase); see Appendix Table 11. Prior to our work, the only demonstration of few-shot proof autoformalization used the proprietary Codex model (Jiang et al., 2023).
items.zh: 在非形式到形式证明上，Llemma-7b 证明了 22.1% 的定理，优于其 Code Llama 初始化和 Sledgehammer 证明器。Llemma 证明的定理通常与 Sledgehammer 证明的定理互补：取 Sledgehammer 和 Llemma 证明的并集，得到 26 个新的验证证明（增加 11 个百分点）和 17 个新的测试证明（增加 7 个百分点）；见附录表 11。在我们之前，少样本证明自动形式化的唯一演示使用了专有的 Codex 模型（Jiang et al., 2023）。

items.en: On Lean 4 formal-to-formal proving, Llemma-7b improves upon its Code Llama initialization, and performs similar to ReProver (Yang et al., 2023), a retrieval-augmented language model finetuned for tactic prediction. Llemma adapts to the task using a 3 example prompt, which to our knowledge is the first demonstration of few-shot tactic prediction for theorem proving by an open model.
items.zh: 在 Lean 4 形式到形式证明上，Llemma-7b 优于其 Code Llama 初始化，并且性能与 ReProver（Yang et al., 2023）相似，ReProver 是一个为策略预测微调的检索增强语言模型。Llemma 使用 3 个示例的提示适应任务，据我们所知，这是开放模型首次展示定理证明的少样本策略预测。

items.en: When training a language model, it is common to upsample high-quality subsets of the training data according to mixture weights (Brown et al., 2020; Gao et al., 2020; Xie et al., 2023). We select mixture weights by doing short training runs on several hand-picked mixture weights, then choosing the one which minimizes perplexity on a set of high-quality held-out text (we use the MATH training set). Table 5 shows the MATH training set perplexity of models trained using different mixtures of arXiv to web to code. Based on these results, we trained Llemma with a ratio of 2:4:1:24:12:4:1. Note that our methodology uses the MATH training set to determine a training hyperparameter, though we expect that the effect is similar to that of related high-quality texts.
items.zh: 在训练语言模型时，通常根据混合权重对训练数据中的高质量子集进行上采样（Brown et al., 2020; Gao et al., 2020; Xie et al., 2023）。我们通过在一些手工挑选的混合权重上进行短训练运行，然后选择在高质量保留文本集（我们使用 MATH 训练集）上使困惑度最小化的权重来选择混合权重。表 5 显示了使用不同 arXiv 与网页与代码混合比例训练的模型在 MATH 训练集上的困惑度。基于这些结果，我们以 2:4:1:24:12:4:1 的比例训练 Llemma。注意，我们的方法使用 MATH 训练集来确定训练超参数，尽管我们预期其效果与相关高质量文本类似。

items.en: We check whether any 30-gram in a test sequence (either an input problem or an output solution) occurs in any OpenWebMath or 𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄𝖠𝗅𝗀𝖾𝖻𝗋𝖺𝗂𝖼𝖲𝗍𝖺𝖼𝗄\mathsf{AlgebraicStack} document. If so, we say that a hit occurred between the sequence and the document. Table 6 shows hits between sequences from MATH and documents from 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2}. Using our methodology, around 7% of MATH test problem statements and 0.6% of MATH test solutions have hits. Note that our methodology gives a lower bound on the number of semantically equivalent sequences (e.g., it does not account for alternative phrasing).
items.zh: 我们检查测试序列（输入问题或输出解答）中的任何 30-gram 是否出现在任何 OpenWebMath 或 AlgebraicStack 文档中。如果是，我们说该序列与文档之间发生了命中。表 6 显示了来自 MATH 的序列与来自 Proof-Pile-2 的文档之间的命中。使用我们的方法，大约 7% 的 MATH 测试问题陈述和 0.6% 的 MATH 测试解答存在命中。注意，我们的方法给出了语义等价序列数量的下界（例如，它不考虑替代措辞）。

items.en: We manually inspected 100 uniformly sampled hits between a test problem statement and an OpenWebMath document. 41 of the cases had no solution, which included websites with a list of problems, discussions, or hints. 49 had an alternative solution to the MATH ground-truth solution, but with the same answer. These include solutions that solve the problem differently than the ground-truth, solutions with missing details, and discussions that include the answer. 9 cases had a missing or incorrect answer, and 1 had the same solution as in the ground-truth. In summary, we find that solutions can appear in a corpus derived from web documents, particularly alternative solutions to those in the evaluation set. We repeated our analysis with 20-gram hits and our findings were similar, though with false positives; see Appendix Figure 6 for examples.
items.zh: 我们手动检查了测试问题陈述与 OpenWebMath 文档之间均匀采样的 100 个命中。其中 41 个案例没有解答，包括包含问题列表、讨论或提示的网站。49 个案例有与 MATH 真实解答不同的替代解答，但答案相同。这些包括以与真实解答不同方式解决问题的解答、缺少细节的解答以及包含答案的讨论。9 个案例缺少答案或答案错误，1 个案例与真实解答相同。总之，我们发现解答可能出现在源自网络文档的语料库中，特别是评估集中解答的替代解答。我们使用 20-gram 命中重复了分析，结果相似，但存在误报；见附录图 6 示例。

items.en: Next, we evaluate Llemma-34b on the test examples with a 30-gram hit, and the test examples without a 30-gram hit. Table 7 shows the accuracy partitioned by MATH difficulty level. The model’s accuracy remains low on difficult problems (e.g., 6.08% on Level 5 problems with a hit, versus 6.39% on problems without a hit), and we observe no clear relationship between 30-gram hits and accuracy across difficulty levels. We conclude that a nontrivial match between a test example and a training document did not imply that the model generated a memorized correct answer. We repeated the analysis with 20-grams and with the 7b model, and our findings were analogous. Figure 7 shows an example.
items.zh: 接下来，我们在有 30-gram 命中的测试示例和没有 30-gram 命中的测试示例上评估 Llemma-34b。表 7 显示了按 MATH 难度级别划分的准确率。模型在困难问题上的准确率仍然较低（例如，有命中的 Level 5 问题为 6.08%，无命中的问题为 6.39%），并且我们观察到 30-gram 命中与准确率之间在不同难度级别上没有明确关系。我们得出结论，测试示例与训练文档之间的非平凡匹配并不意味着模型生成了记忆的正确答案。我们使用 20-gram 和 7b 模型重复了分析，结果类似。图 7 显示了一个示例。

items.en: Finally, we check 30-gram hits between Llemma’s MATH generations and OpenWebMath. There were 13 hits, which occurred when the model generated a common sequence of numbers (e.g., a list of Fibonacci numbers), plus one instance of factoring a polynomial. Appendix Figure 6 shows an example. We find all of these observations worthy of further study. Using Llemma and 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2} to better understand data, memorization, and performance is an interesting future direction. We include the code for our analysis in the Llemma repository.
items.zh: 最后，我们检查了 Llemma 的 MATH 生成与 OpenWebMath 之间的 30-gram 命中。共有 13 个命中，发生在模型生成常见数字序列（例如，斐波那契数列列表）时，以及一个多项式因式分解实例。附录图 6 显示了一个示例。我们发现所有这些观察都值得进一步研究。使用 Llemma 和 Proof-Pile-2 来更好地理解数据、记忆化和性能是一个有趣的未来方向。我们将分析代码包含在 Llemma 仓库中。

items.en: Large-scale language modeling. Recent progress in large language models involves two connected threads: the increasing scale of models and data (Hoffmann et al., 2022; Kaplan et al., 2020; Chowdhery et al., 2022), and a progression toward more generalist models (Radford et al., 2019; Brown et al., 2020) which are capable of solving diverse problems and adapting quickly to novel tasks. A third thread relates to enabling open access to language models with these capabilities (Black et al., 2022; Biderman et al., 2023; Touvron et al., 2023; Rozière et al., 2023). Our work provides a recipe for specializing these language models to the domain of mathematics, providing a platform for further research and applications.
items.zh: 大规模语言建模。近期大型语言模型的进展涉及两个相互关联的线索：模型和数据规模的不断增加（Hoffmann et al., 2022; Kaplan et al., 2020; Chowdhery et al., 2022），以及向更通用模型的发展（Radford et al., 2019; Brown et al., 2020），这些模型能够解决多样化问题并快速适应新任务。第三条线索涉及开放获取具有这些能力的语言模型（Black et al., 2022; Biderman et al., 2023; Touvron et al., 2023; Rozière et al., 2023）。我们的工作提供了一种将这些语言模型专门化到数学领域的配方，为后续研究和应用提供了平台。

items.en: Domain adaptation. Language model applications typically require a general-domain pretraining step, followed by a shorter fine-tuning step. The finetuning step is often aimed at imbuing instruction-following ability (Sanh et al., 2022; Wei et al., 2022) or aligning a model’s outputs with human preferences (Ziegler et al., 2019; Ouyang et al., 2022; Bai et al., 2022). Other work explores adapting pretrained models to novel domains by continued training (Rozière et al., 2023; Beltagy et al., 2019), parameter-efficient finetuning methods (Yong et al., 2023), retrieval augmentation (Min et al., 2023; Asai et al., 2023), and other techniques. We provide an adaptation recipe involving continued training and targeted data collection.
items.zh: 领域适应。语言模型应用通常需要通用领域的预训练步骤，然后是较短的微调步骤。微调步骤通常旨在赋予指令遵循能力（Sanh et al., 2022; Wei et al., 2022）或使模型输出与人类偏好对齐（Ziegler et al., 2019; Ouyang et al., 2022; Bai et al., 2022）。其他工作探索通过持续训练（Rozière et al., 2023; Beltagy et al., 2019）、参数高效微调方法（Yong et al., 2023）、检索增强（Min et al., 2023; Asai et al., 2023）和其他技术来使预训练模型适应新领域。我们提供了一种涉及持续训练和针对性数据收集的适应配方。

items.en: Language models for mathematics. Applying large language models to problems in mathematics is an active subfield of machine learning, including benchmarking mathematical knowledge and reasoning at varying levels (Hendrycks et al., 2021b; Zheng et al., 2021; Welleck et al., 2022; Azerbayev et al., 2023). Although achieving strong mathematical reasoning is an important target, it is difficult to assess the correctness of models’ answers and processes, especially as models become more capable (Bowman et al., 2022; Uesato et al., 2022; Lightman et al., 2023; Cobbe et al., 2021).
items.zh: 数学语言模型。将大型语言模型应用于数学问题是机器学习的一个活跃子领域，包括在不同层次上基准测试数学知识和推理（Hendrycks et al., 2021b; Zheng et al., 2021; Welleck et al., 2022; Azerbayev et al., 2023）。尽管实现强大的数学推理是一个重要目标，但评估模型答案和过程的正确性很困难，尤其是当模型能力更强时（Bowman et al., 2022; Uesato et al., 2022; Lightman et al., 2023; Cobbe et al., 2021）。

items.en: A number of recent works focus on supervised finetuning on task-relevant (input, output) pairs (e.g.,Yu et al. (2023); Yue et al. (2023)). Doing so boosts performance on some common mathematical language modeling benchmarks, but trains the model for these specific tasks. In contrast, Lewkowycz et al. (2022) and our work seek to train a base language model as a platform for further development.
items.zh: 近期许多工作专注于在任务相关的（输入，输出）对上进行监督微调（例如，Yu et al. (2023); Yue et al. (2023)）。这样做提升了一些常见数学语言建模基准的性能，但使模型为这些特定任务进行了训练。相比之下，Lewkowycz et al. (2022) 和我们的工作旨在训练一个基础语言模型作为进一步开发的平台。

items.en: Language models for formal mathematics. An ongoing line of work explores integrating language models with interactive proof assistants in the context of mathematics. This includes synthesizing proofs via tactic prediction (Polu & Sutskever, 2020; Han et al., 2022; Lample et al., 2022; Jiang et al., 2022), autoformalization (Wu et al., 2022; Jiang et al., 2023), and integrated tools (Welleck & Saha, 2023). Due to high computational costs of search, language models applied to this domain have traditionally been small, but recent work has demonstrated promise in the use of larger models (First et al., 2023; Jiang et al., 2023). Our work provides a demonstration of few-shot proof autoformalization and tactic prediction, a large collection of formal mathematics data, along with an open access model for further exploring these directions.
items.zh: 形式数学语言模型。一系列持续的工作探索将语言模型与交互式证明助手在数学背景下集成。这包括通过策略预测合成证明（Polu & Sutskever, 2020; Han et al., 2022; Lample et al., 2022; Jiang et al., 2022）、自动形式化（Wu et al., 2022; Jiang et al., 2023）和集成工具（Welleck & Saha, 2023）。由于搜索的高计算成本，应用于该领域的语言模型传统上规模较小，但近期工作展示了使用更大模型的前景（First et al., 2023; Jiang et al., 2023）。我们的工作提供了少样本证明自动形式化和策略预测的演示，一个大规模的形式数学数据集合，以及一个用于进一步探索这些方向的开放访问模型。

items.en: We introduce Llemma and 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2}, a novel base model and corpus for language modeling of mathematics. Our models, dataset, and code are openly available. We have shown that Llemma achieves state-of-the-art results for open-weights models on mathematical problem solving benchmarks, shown capabilities of using external tools via Python code, and demonstrated few-shot tactic prediction for theorem proving. We hope that Llemma and 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗈𝖿\mathsf{Proof}-𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾𝖯𝗂𝗅𝖾\mathsf{Pile}-𝟤2\mathsf{2} will be a useful base for future work on understanding language model generalization and dataset composition, investigating the limits of domain-specific language models, using language models as tools for mathematicians, and improving the mathematical capabilities of language models.
items.zh: 我们介绍了 Llemma 和 Proof-Pile-2，一个新颖的基础模型和用于数学语言建模的语料库。我们的模型、数据集和代码是公开可用的。我们已经表明，Llemma 在数学问题求解基准上取得了开放权重模型的最先进结果，展示了通过 Python 代码使用外部工具的能力，并演示了定理证明的少样本策略预测。我们希望 Llemma 和 Proof-Pile-2 将成为未来工作的有用基础，用于理解语言模型泛化和数据集组成、研究领域特定语言模型的极限、使用语言模型作为数学家的工具，以及提高语言模型的数学能力。

items.en: We would like to thank Dragomir Radev, Arman Cohan, Jesse Michael Han, and the Deepmind Blueshift team for valuable guidance. We thank Jonah Philion for the model name. We thank Aviya Skowron for advising us on ethical considerations in the development and release of our models. We thank Jonathan Laurent and Leo Du for contributions to our open-source code.
items.zh: 我们要感谢 Dragomir Radev、Arman Cohan、Jesse Michael Han 和 Deepmind Blueshift 团队提供的宝贵指导。感谢 Jonah Philion 提供的模型名称。感谢 Aviya Skowron 在模型开发和发布中的伦理考虑方面给予的建议。感谢 Jonathan Laurent 和 Leo Du 对我们开源代码的贡献。

items.en: We would also like to thank several parties for donating computing resources for this project: Stability AI (training the Llemma models), CoreWeave (evaluations and finetuning), the Province of Ontario and companies sponsoring the Vector Institute for Artificial Intelligence (www.vectorinstitute.ai/partners), and Brigham Young University (finetuning). KP is supported by an NSERC PGS-D award.
items.zh: 我们还要感谢多方为本项目捐赠计算资源：Stability AI（训练 Llemma 模型）、CoreWeave（评估和微调）、安大略省和赞助 Vector Institute for Artificial Intelligence 的公司（www.vectorinstitute.ai/partners），以及杨百翰大学（微调）。KP 由 NSERC PGS-D 奖项支持。
